title: Training Composer 2
summary: Cursor's Composer 2 is built from Kimi K2.5 (1T params, 32B active, 256K context) with continued pre-training on coding tasks and long-horizon reinforcement learning using auto-install bootstrapping. The model uses reward shaping with nonlinear length penalties and self-summarization to optimize for coding speed and depth.
